rationale: Removing deprecated internal utility classes; internal refactor with no spec behavior.
Removing deprecated connection-related internal classes; API cleanup, no spec rule involved.
Removing deprecated read preference class; API cleanup, no spec rule violated.
Removing deprecated JMX monitoring classes; internal API cleanup, no spec behavior.
Removing deprecated MapReduceOutput methods; API cleanup, no spec rule involved.
Removing deprecated lazy BSON classes; internal API cleanup, no BSON spec rule violated.
Removing deprecated encoder/decoder internal methods; API cleanup, no spec rule violated.
Custom DBEncoder ignored for $cmd collection; Java-specific API bug, no cross-language spec rule.
Feature request to control _id generation; API ergonomics improvement, no spec requirement violated.
Java Pattern compilation for BSON regex is a Java-language-specific performance/ergonomics concern, not a BSON spec rule violation.
Driver uses null-check instead of containsField for _id; spec requires inserting {_id:null} as-is. JavaScript driver allows it.
SDAM spec defines standalone handling when seed list has multiple servers; driver drops all servers instead of dropping the standalone.
Duplicate seed host bug causing incorrect removal; implementation bug in dedup logic, no specific SDAM spec rule.
Description explicitly says change makes driver consistent with mongos and other drivers for heartbeatFrequency default.
Extended JSON spec requires $numberLong support for MongoDB 2.6; driver rejects it with dollar-sign field error.
Cursors spec requires killing cursor on early iteration exit; async client fails to do so.
Server allows commands up to maxBsonObjectSize; driver incorrectly rejects commands exceeding that limit due to envelope bytes.
NPE when passing null read preference via deprecated MongoOptions constructor; internal API bug, no spec rule.
Codec always serializes _id first, overly strict for sort/min/max contexts; implementation behavior, BSON spec does not mandate field order.
Connection pool not invalidated on monitor-detected disconnect; implementation improvement, no specific CMAP spec rule violated.
WriteResult.isUpdateOfExisting returns true when n=0; spec requires false when no documents matched/updated.
Timeout exception message missing full wait time; error message improvement, no spec rule defines exception message content.
getDescription() doesn't force frequent connection attempts; implementation optimization, no specific SDAM spec rule violated.
IllegalArgumentException thrown instead of command error; internal error handling inconsistency, no spec-defined error propagation rule.
Bulk API nUpserted count wrong for pre-2.6 servers when _id isn't ObjectId; spec defines correct upserted count handling.
Some command helper methods skip throwOnError; inconsistent API contract, no cross-language spec rule defines this behavior.
Internal refactor of AbstractBsonWriter to move logic from subclasses; no behavior change, no spec rule.
Incorrect @since version in API reference Javadoc; documentation bug, no spec behavior.
ServerMonitor doesn't log failed connection attempt; logging/observability bug, no SDAM spec rule on logging.
Integer stored as double (12 vs 12.0) in aggregate result; Java numeric type coercion, no BSON spec violation named.
DBCursor.addSpecial missing some query modifiers; API completeness improvement, not a specific spec nonconformance.
MapReduce 'ok' field returned as 1.0 instead of 1; numeric type display issue, no spec rule on ok field type.
URI parsing fails for passwords containing '@'; connection string spec requires percent-encoding support for special chars.
save() inserts duplicate _id instead of replacing; likely user error or bug report without clear spec rule citation.
drop() doesn't delete collection; extremely thin description, cannot determine if spec-related without more detail.
MongoTimeoutException in GridFS upload; connectivity/user environment issue, no spec behavior involved.
Adding null/range validation to Operation constructors; defensive programming improvement, no spec rule violated.
SDAM spec defines ghost replica set member handling; initializing cluster type from ghost response is incorrect per spec.
Builder method returns wrong parent type causing compile error; Java API design bug, no spec behavior involved.
NumberFormatException for http:// URI; error message improvement request, spec doesn't define exception type for invalid URIs.
Deprecating internal CommandFailureException method; API cleanup before 3.0, no spec rule.
Deprecating WriteConcern.getCommand(); API cleanup, no spec rule violated.
Deprecating CommandResult.getServerUsed(); internal API cleanup, no spec rule.
Feature request to expose duplicate key property name in exception; API ergonomics, no spec rule.
Deprecating unused MongoServerSelectionException; API cleanup, no spec rule.
Deprecating CommandFailureException constructor/method; API cleanup before 3.0, no spec rule.
Deprecating MongoInterruptedException constructors; API cleanup, no spec rule.
Deprecating WriteConcernException constructor/method for 3.0 removal; API cleanup, no spec rule.
Deprecating internal ServerError class; API cleanup, no spec rule.
REPLICA_ACKNOWLEDGED behavior with arbiter nodes; appears to be user misunderstanding of replica set semantics, not a spec violation.
